---
title: "Before the day"
subtitle: "Three short reads, about 15 minutes total, so you arrive ready."
listing:
  contents: "readings/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "order"
  fields: [title, description, reading-time]
  date-format: ""
---

You don't need any technical background for this masterclass. These three short pieces just give everyone a shared starting point and the language we'll use on the day. Read them in order if you can — they walk from *what AI is*, to *when to trust it*, to *why delivering an AI project is different*.

:::: {#listing}
::::

:::: {.callout-note}
## Want to go further?
Everything here is drawn from the free companion book, [*Conversation, Not Delegation*](https://michael-borck.github.io/conversation-not-delegation/). It's optional, but if a topic grabs you, that's where to dig.
::::
